title: Multiple times zoom in/out
scenario: Quick Start Guide zoom in/out functionality fails or app becomes unstable when circle button is used multiple times across QSG screens
steps: Tap the Quick Start Guide (QSG) option
On any QSG screen, tap the circle button to zoom in
Tap the circle button again to zoom out
Navigate to the next QSG screen and repeat the zoom in/out sequence
Repeat for all QSG screens available
expected: The app remains stable with no crashes or freezes. The zoom in/out functionality works correctly on every QSG screen when the circle button is tapped multiple times.
